body:
Chloe, it was great connecting with you at the [Climate Forward Summit](events/climate-forward-summit) last week — your demo of [CarbonLedger](companies/carbonledger)'s real-time emissions reconciliation layer genuinely stopped me in my tracks. I've been thinking about the architecture you described, particularly how you're handling the data ingestion from disparate industrial sensors, and I think there's a compelling story there for enterprise buyers who are drowning in fragmented reporting obligations. We'd love to set up a deeper technical and commercial diligence call with a couple of folks from our team here at [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital) — would you have 45 minutes sometime in the next two weeks? If it's easier, feel free to send over a deck or any materials ahead of time so we can come prepared with sharper questions.

Amara
